userId.description: References the ID of the built-in User entity (1:1 relationship)

orgId.description: Organization this user profile belongs to

orgRole.description: Role within the organization: owner (full control), manager (admin without ownership), member (regular team member)

isOrgOwner.description: Legacy field for backward compatibility - true if this user is the organization owner

name: UserProfile
description: Stores organization-specific role information for users. Created to extend the built-in User entity.
